handoff_packets.content:
{
  "cwd": "/Users/sam.zhang/Documents/codex-supervisor",
  "execution_layer_policy": {
    "agentic_lead_policy": {
      "min_subagents": 0,
      "policy": "off",
      "required_evidence_grade": "self_reported",
      "required_roles": [],
      "solo_exception_for_artifact_only_gates": false
    },
    "allowed_dynamic_workflow_task_classes": [],
    "codex_supervises_final_artifact": true,
    "dynamic_workflow_task_class": null,
    "lead_execution_layer": "single_lead_worker",
    "mode": "lead_direct",
    "preview_required_gates": [],
    "supervision_layer": "codex_plus_lead"
  },
  "expected_decisions": [],
  "expected_objections": [],
  "expected_specialists": [],
  "gate": "outcome_review",
  "instruction": "Supervisor-owned workflow gate: outcome_review.\n\nIntent:\nAdd the event-tail read cursor plus index that lets a consumer follow the event log incrementally, so an MCP transport drop can reconnect and catch up instead of restarting. The exact gap is that recent_events is a last-N read, there is no read_events_since WHERE event_id > ?, the events index is currently (run_id, ts) rather than (run_id, event_id), and run_watches.last_event_id has no generic after-this-id read behind it. Scope: add State.read_events_since(run_id, after_event_id, limit) using event_id > cursor ORDER BY event_id ASC LIMIT, add CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_run_event ON events(run_id, event_id) while keeping idx_events_run, prove the writer/reader boundary with a disconnect/reconnect consumer test, tolerate non-contiguous AUTOINCREMENT event ids, preserve recent_events/read_dual_agent_gate_events/replay behavior, and keep full suite green. Non-goals: do not make events the sole source of truth, do not change submit/job semantics, terminal-result storage, production Telegram progress, or resumable MCP transport.\n\nReview this gate against the current source artifacts and return a typed dual_agent_outcome.\nUse decisions/objections to say whether the gate should accept, revise, or deny.",
  "lead_skill": null,
  "outcome_validation_policy": {
    "fidelity_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "malformed_outcome": "retry_once_with_corrective_packet",
    "subprocess_failure": "abort_to_operator",
    "timeout": "abort_to_operator"
  },
  "packet_schema_version": "dual-agent-handoff/v1",
  "planning_artifacts": [
    {
      "kind": "prd",
      "mutable_by_worker": false,
